description.value:
Your studies have taken you out of the comfort of your domicile. Fortunately, your unique biology provides you with the perfect means to surviving the harshest environments.

You can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Subsist] in any atmospheric environment. You're never @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Fatigued] or at risk of dying from a lack of food regardless of your result.

In addition, your silicon biology allows you to survive in inhospitable temperatures. Environmental effects are one step less extreme for you (incredible becomes extreme, extreme becomes severe, and so on).
